title: M.Sc. & Ph.D. Applicants
description: We are looking for motivated graduate students with a strong background in machine learning, mathematics and programming, and an interest in computer vision, topology-aware learning or uncertainty estimation. Apply to the Bilkent CS graduate program and mention NeuraVision.

title: Undergraduate Researchers
description: Bilkent undergraduates interested in research can join the lab for semester or summer projects. A solid grasp of Python, deep-learning frameworks and linear algebra is expected.

title: Visiting Researchers & Interns
description: We occasionally host visiting students and interns. If our research aligns with your interests, reach out with your CV and a short statement of interest.
